name: ai-mobile
description: Capacity-aware Codex project manager for native Codex workers, local Antigravity models, Claude Code, and optional Cursor on Windows, with bounded context, CLI-first execution, failover, and durable continuity.

interface.shortDescription: Run one Codex chat as a capacity-aware project manager across local AI workers.
interface.longDescription: AI Mobile turns one Codex chat into a goal-driven project control room for Windows. It discovers native Codex models and supported efforts, local Codex capacity windows, Claude and Antigravity quotas, cooldowns, and recent outcomes; packages transcript-free project context; builds a dependency-aware work graph; and coordinates native host agents with external CLI workers. The objective continues until verified, genuinely blocked, or explicitly stopped while rolling capacity checkpoints keep assignments current. The current Codex session remains project manager, active narrow contributor, critic, integrator, and final verifier. Provider failures receive one bounded failover, while desktop UI is reserved for visible state that CLI adapters cannot represent.
defaultPrompt: Plan and execute this project with AI Mobile using current capacity
Show Codex and Claude usage windows
